li.label: New favorite dice!
li.description: Found a new favorite dice set! The luck on these math rocks is absolutely unreal.

li.label: New favorite dice!
li.description: Blessed by the RNG gods. This set refuses to roll anything less than a critical success.

li.label: New favorite dice!
li.description: New favorite dice set acquired. Manifesting natural 20s only.

li.label: rolled a nat 1
li.description: I rolled a natural 1. The universe has personally mocked me.

li.label: mediocre roll
li.description: The die landed somewhere in the mushy middle.

li.label: great roll
li.description: The shiny math rock smiled on me.

li.label: rolled a nat 20!
li.description: Natural 20! I am unstoppable, at least emotionally.
